{{Infobox character
| name = Malice
| parents = {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Malice]]}}
| children = {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Mercy]], [[Fury]], [[Akura Pride|Pride]]}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|, [[Akura Justice|Justice]]}}
| abilities = {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[shadow madra]]}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|, [[Spiritual pressure|spiritual pressure]]}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|, [[Dark Tide Incantation]], [[Enforcer technique]], [[Silent King madra]]}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|, Shadestep technique, [[hunger madra]]}}
| titles = {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Monarch]]}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|, Queen of the Akura clan}}
| affiliations = {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Akura clan|Akura family]]}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|, [[Akura clan]]}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|, [[Moongrave]]}}
| professions = {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Soulsmith|soulsmith]]}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|, [[Sage]]}}
| residence = {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Moongrave]]}}
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Ghostwater (novel)|Ghostwater]]
}}

''See also: [[Malice Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Akura Malice]] is [[the Queen]] of the [[Akura clan]] and a powerful figure seeking to ascend to the rank of [[Monarch]]. A practitioner of a pure shadow Path, she specializes in [[Ruler]] and [[Forger techniques]], utilizing [[madra]] that combines power with utility. Although she is famous for creating the Book of Eternal Night—an idealized version of her [[Path]]—she does not actually possess a Book herself. Her lineage includes notable descendants such as [[Fury]], a legendary warrior and [[Herald]], and [[Charity]], a [[Sage]]. Her daughter, [[Mercy]], is also a chosen of Malice. Malice is characterized by a ruthless and tyrannical nature, often prioritizing control and the preservation of the current world order over all else. She is known to be manipulative, willing to use lies and betrayal to maintain her position or protect her interests. Her reputation is one of immense, continent-shattering power; she has been known to engage in warfare that can topple cities and is capable of massive displays of [[madra]], such as summoning shadow skulls or wearing armor that makes her appear as large as a [[Dreadgod]]. Despite her capacity for cruelty and her tendency to view allies through the lens of utility, she is driven by a desire to maintain stability and prevent the chaos of radical change.}}

== Ghostwater ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Malice]] has brood.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c19">''Ghostwater'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Uncrowned ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Malice]] is represented by the largest star in the [[Akura]] family emblem.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c7">''Uncrowned'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Malice]] has at least two children participating in the tournament.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c11">''Uncrowned'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|A [[Monarch]] who once noticed and protected [[Eithan]] Arelius, Malice melted into the shadows and established mental and spiritual spaces within the pages of the Book of Eternal Night. After single-handedly stopping the [[Bleeding Phoenix]], she prepared for an upcoming conflict against cults that would tip the balance of power. During a battle against the [[Dragon King]], she utilized a tower-sized bow glowing with blue, purple, and green light to launch a technique that filled half the world with flying shadow skulls. As the last remaining fighter for her family, she demonstrated a willingness to sacrifice [[Fury]], [[Pride]], and [[Mercy]] for the greater good. Throughout these events, she appeared wearing dark blue instead of her customary purple and maintained complex plans regarding her children who were participating in the battle.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">29</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Malice]] melted into shadows.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c2">''Wintersteel'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Malice]] is a character who once noticed [[Eithan]] Arelius.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c4">''Wintersteel'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Malice]] provides protection to [[Eithan]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c4" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Malice]] has a daughter who could potentially petition her mother for transport.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c7">''Wintersteel'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Malice]] found the situation important enough to fuel a pathway for transportation.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c7" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Malice]] created mental and spiritual spaces within the pages of the Book of Eternal Night.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c8">''Wintersteel'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Malice]] stopped the [[Bleeding Phoenix]] by herself.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c9">''Wintersteel'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Akura Grace]] resembles a younger version of [[Malice]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c10">''Wintersteel'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Malice]] will be fighting against the cults.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c11">''Wintersteel'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Malice]]'s intervention would tip the balance of conflict.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c13">''Wintersteel'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Malice]] is a [[Monarch]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c15">''Wintersteel'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Malice]] could make [[Eithan]]'s [[life]] miserable.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c15" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Malice]] is [[Mercy's mother]] and a [[Monarch]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c16">''Wintersteel'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Malice]] considers the techniques in the Book of Eternal Night to be powerful enough for a future [[Monarch]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c16" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Malice]] is a person who could have sent [[Lindon]] and [[Mercy]] to [[Sky's Edge]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c18">''Wintersteel'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Malice]] has prepared for the fight.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c18" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Malice]] is a [[Monarch]] who wears dark blue instead of her usual purple.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c21">''Wintersteel'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Malice]] would not have allowed the current situation if [[Fury]] did not have a way out.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c21" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Malice]] would not allow her final representative to give in to temptation.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c22">''Wintersteel'', chapter 22</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Malice]] is the only remaining fighter for her family.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c22" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Malice]] is willing to sacrifice [[Fury]], [[Pride]], and [[Mercy]] for the good of her family.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c22" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Malice]] has youngest children that [[Calan]] is tasked to kill.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c25">''Wintersteel'', chapter 25</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Malice]] has plans regarding [[Fury]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c26">''Wintersteel'', chapter 26</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Malice]] asked [[Yerin]] what her signature was.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c26" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Malice]] has children who are participating in the battle.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c27">''Wintersteel'', chapter 27</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Malice]] was fighting the [[Dragon King]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c28">''Wintersteel'', chapter 28</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Malice]] launched a technique that filled half the world with flying skulls of shadow.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c28" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Malice]] used a bow the size of a tower that shone blue, purple, and green.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c28" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Malice]]'s attack would be an inconvenience for [[Reigan Shen]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c28" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|A [[Monarch]] who values useless conversation, Malice is a figure whose exploits have become mere myths within the [[Akura clan]]. While she has never directly commanded [[Dreadgods]], she is capable of fighting a [[Phoenix]] to a standstill for three days and possesses the strength to drive off a [[Wandering Titan]]. During combat, she can be seen wearing amethyst or purple armor—sometimes on a scale as large as a [[Titan]]—and utilizes [[shadow madra]] to create webs or fires arrows of forged blue madra. Accompanied by a cloud of violet [[essence]], she has stood beside [[Yerin]], to whom she owes a prize. Furthermore, [[Mercy]] holds an impression of Malice, a being who might send her away and whose success would result in [[Mercy]] remaining in this world for the rest of her [[life]].}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">17</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|If [[Mercy]] succeeds [[Malice]], she will stay in this world for the rest of her [[life]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c2">''Bloodline'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Malice]] owes [[Yerin]] a prize.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c2" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Malice]]'s exploits are myths in the [[Akura clan]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c13">''Bloodline'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Mercy]] holds an impression of [[Malice]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c13" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Malice]] is standing beside [[Yerin]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c14">''Bloodline'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Malice]] would drive off the [[Wandering Titan]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c16">''Bloodline'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Malice]] uses [[Forged]] blue madra arrows.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c16" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Malice]] wears amethyst armor.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c16" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Malice]] is steering her opponent away from the labyrinth entrance.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c17">''Bloodline'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Malice]] wears armor the size of the [[Titan]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c17" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Malice]] uses [[shadow madra]] to create webs.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c17" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Malice]] fought the [[Phoenix]] to a standstill for three days previously.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c17" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Malice]] wears purple armor.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c17" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Malice]] is someone who might send [[Mercy]] away.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c18">''Bloodline'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Malice]] had not commanded [[Dreadgods]] directly.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c19">''Bloodline'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Malice]] is accompanied by a cloud of violet [[essence]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c21">''Bloodline'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Malice]] is a [[Monarch]] who values useless conversation.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c21" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|As one of the two remaining pillars of the [[Akura]] family alongside [[Charity]], Malice serves as [[the Queen]] of the [[Akura clan]] and has a daughter named [[Mercy]], who is named after her. During the [[Uncrowned King]] tournament, she displayed a specific attitude toward [[Mercy]], and [[Eithan]] later questioned if [[the Queen]] held a personal grudge against him. After sensing power erupting from the western labyrinth, Malice attacked [[Yerin]] and emerged as a potential future opponent within the maze. While positioned above the [[labyrinth]] with a wide, crazed smile and purple eyes, she utilized spiritual pressure and was noted as the mother of a son named [[Fury]]. Following an encounter where she held [[Mercy]], Malice found herself in the [[World of Night]] before eventually breaking her way out.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">17</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Malice]] has a daughter.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c2">''Reaper'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Eithan]] wonders if [[Malice]] has a grudge against him.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c4">''Reaper'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Malice]] is one of the two remaining pillars of the [[Akura]] family with [[Charity]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c7">''Reaper'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Malice]] had a certain attitude toward [[Mercy]] during the [[Uncrowned King]] tournament.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c9">''Reaper'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Malice]] felt power erupting from the western labyrinth.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c10">''Reaper'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Malice]] is attacking [[Yerin]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c18">''Reaper'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Malice]] is the virtue [[Mercy]] is named after.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c18" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Malice]] is a potential future opponent in the [[labyrinth]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c20">''Reaper'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] may eventually have to swear an oath to [[Malice]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c23">''Reaper'', chapter 23</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Malice]] is [[the Queen]] of the [[Akura clan]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c24">''Reaper'', chapter 24</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Malice]] is present above the [[labyrinth]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c25">''Reaper'', chapter 25</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Malice]] has a wide and crazed smile.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c25" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Malice]] has purple eyes.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c25" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Malice]] has a son named [[Fury]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c25" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Malice]] can use spiritual pressure.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c25" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Malice]] finds herself in the [[World of Night]] with [[Mercy]] in her arms.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c26">''Reaper'', chapter 26</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Malice]] broke her way out of the [[World of Night]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c27">''Reaper'', chapter 27</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|A [[Soulsmith]] and member of the [[Akura]] family, Malice is a [[Monarch]] who founded [[Moongrave]] over four hundred years ago and has spent centuries slaying [[dragons]]. During the conflict against the [[Silent King]] and his horde, she fought with a foreboding purple-and-black aesthetic, utilizing [[bloodline armor]] and a crystalline bow that could transform into a staff. Her devastating combat techniques included multiplying arrows to turn the sky black, manifesting a royal specter, and using shadow fragments to slice souls. While observing from her floating cloud fortress, she demonstrated immense power by commanding the [[Way]] and utilizing the [[Dark Tide Incantation]]. Throughout these events, she interacted with [[Lindon]] by explaining the relationship between [[Dreadgods]] and [[Monarchs]] and eventually releasing him from his pain.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">48</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Malice]] sponsors camps in [[Sacred Valley]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c3">''Dreadgod'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Malice]] informed [[Lindon]] about the relationship between [[Dreadgods]] and [[Monarchs]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c5">''Dreadgod'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Malice]] uses shadow to transport herself.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c6">''Dreadgod'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Malice's bloodline armor]] bleeds away to purple [[essence]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c6" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Malice]] has black hair.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c6" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Malice]]'s prop is mentioned in relation to [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c7">''Dreadgod'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Malice]] founded [[Moongrave]] over four hundred years ago.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c8">''Dreadgod'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|Enraging [[Malice]] is a concern for [[Charity]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c10">''Dreadgod'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Malice]]'s preferred aesthetic is foreboding purple-and-black.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c12">''Dreadgod'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Malice]] released [[Lindon]] from the consequences of his pain.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c12" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Malice]] is a powerful figure whose strike could rival the power gathered in [[Moongrave]]'s launcher constructs.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c15">''Dreadgod'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Malice]] uses a bow that can transform into a staff.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c15" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Malice]]'s attacks involve arrows that turn the sky black.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c15" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Malice]] uses an [[Enforcer technique]] that manifests a royal specter.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c15" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Malice]]'s spiritual perception passed over the city.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c16">''Dreadgod'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Malice]] is fighting a battle against the [[Silent King]] and his horde.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c16" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Malice]] is a person [[Yerin]] imagined fighting.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c17">''Dreadgod'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Malice]] uses shadow fragments that slice the soul.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c18">''Dreadgod'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Malice]] can multiply one arrow into a thousand.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c18" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Malice]] has the willpower and spiritual resistance of a [[Monarch]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c18" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Malice]] is pelted by a barrage from the reinforced army.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c18" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Malice]] focused on [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c19">''Dreadgod'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Malice]]'s wrath was cold as night.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Malice]] is a [[Soulsmith]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c21">''Dreadgod'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Malice]] is a person [[Lindon]] feared might target the [[Arelius family]] and [[Twin Star Sect]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c21" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Malice]] has not yet plundered the [[Dragon Monarch]]'s desert [[vault]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c21" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Malice]] is a [[Monarch]] who was expected at the meeting with [[Sha Miara]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c22">''Dreadgod'', chapter 22</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Malice]] is observing from one of her floating cloud fortresses.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c23">''Dreadgod'', chapter 23</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Malice]] uses the [[Dark Tide Incantation]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c23" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Malice]] has been slaying [[dragons]] for centuries.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c23" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Malice]] uses [[bloodline armor]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c23" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Malice]] uses a cloud fortress.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c23" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Malice]] uses an amethyst hand.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c23" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Malice]] uses a bow that shoots arrows of ice and [[shadow madra]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c23" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Malice]] can command the [[Way]] to transport her fortress.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c23" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Malice]] uses a crystalline bow.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c23" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Malice]] uses arrows and blades of shadow.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c23" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Malice]] uses a small black ball to create a pocket space via [[shadow madra]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c23" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Malice]]'s black ball is no bigger than [[Suriel]]’s marble.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c23" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Malice]] can summon armor that hovers where her heart should be.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c23" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Malice]] has a crystal hand emerging from her chest.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c23" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Malice]] is part of the [[Akura]] family.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c23" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Malice]] uses a staff.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c23" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Malice]] possesses [[Silent King madra]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c23" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Malice]] has authority.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c23" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Malice]] can produce constructs from her [[soulspace]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c23" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Malice]] is currently fighting.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c24">''Dreadgod'', chapter 24</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Malice]] is attempting to transport [[Mercy]] away.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c24" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Seated upon a throne with shadowy hair within her dark castle's audience chamber, Malice has ruled most of a continent for hundreds of years. Her will and memories are contained within the Book of Eternal Night, which was intended to hold her ideal [[Path]] consisting of the Crown, [[Shadow]], and [[Strength]] [[Icons]]. During combat, she utilizes [[hunger madra]] to launch volleys of arrows from her ice-blue bow and can blast cold stars through the air. She possesses the combined defenses of an earth artist, the subtlety of a shadow artist, the strength of a [[sword]] artist, and the flexibility of a [[Soulsmith]]. Throughout her history, she has treated [[Mercy]] poorly and even knowingly allowed the [[Dreadgods]] to exist to ensure her own power remained preserved.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">39</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Yerin]] once fought [[Malice]] with black [[sword]]-arms.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c2">''Waybound'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Malice]]'s treatment may have left wounds on [[Mercy]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c2" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Mercy]] had fought [[Malice]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c3">''Waybound'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Malice]]'s will and memories are contained within the Book of Eternal Night.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c7">''Waybound'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Malice]] usually carries a bow.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c8">''Waybound'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Malice]] used her armor and called her bow during the attack.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c9">''Waybound'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Malice]]'s technique uses [[hunger madra]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c9" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Malice]] blasted a cold star through the air.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c9" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Malice]]'s arrow was layered with many techniques and condensed power.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c9" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Malice]] treated [[Mercy]] poorly.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c10">''Waybound'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Malice]] launches a volley of arrows.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c10" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Malice]] used hunger echoes of [[Malice]] and [[Reigan Shen]] to fend off [[Striker techniques]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c11">''Waybound'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Malice]] showed amusement during the battle.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c11" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Yerin]] remembers [[Malice]] treating her like a worm on a hook.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c12">''Waybound'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Malice]] learned to imitate the [[Shadestep]] technique when she became a [[Sage]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c13">''Waybound'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Malice]] is a character whom [[Larian]] expects will be jealous of the bow.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c15">''Waybound'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Larian]] mentions wanting [[Malice]]'s bow.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c18">''Waybound'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Malice]]'s instincts warned [[Mercy]] against attaching a mind-spirit to her soul.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c20">''Waybound'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Malice]] is a source of hatred that [[Mercy]] felt.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c20" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Malice]] felt an intrusion into her void space when [[Lindon]] punched into her shadow.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c21">''Waybound'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Malice]] is seated on a throne with shadowy hair.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c24">''Waybound'', chapter 24</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[The Book of Eternal Night]] was meant to contain [[Malice]]’s ideal [[Path]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c25">''Waybound'', chapter 25</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Malice]] occupies an audience chamber in a dark castle.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c26">''Waybound'', chapter 26</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Malice]] does not have a mind-spirit.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c26" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Malice]] can release her [[Netherworld Empress]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c26" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Malice]] threatened that after she was finished with her daughter, no one would remember her existence.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c26" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Malice]] used a solidified [[sword]] of shadow to attack [[Mercy]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c26" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Malice]] released shadow that tore apart her own floating castle.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c26" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Malice]] has the defenses of an earth artist, the subtlety of a shadow artist, the strength of a [[sword]] artist, and the flexibility of a [[Soulsmith]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c27">''Waybound'', chapter 27</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Malice]] has ruled most of a continent for hundreds of years.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c27" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Malice]] uses an ice-blue bow.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c27" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Malice]] opens a pitch-black void space.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c27" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Malice]] can open her [[void key]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c27" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Malice]] wears armor.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c27" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Malice]] knowingly allowed the [[Dreadgods]] to exist to preserve her own power.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c28">''Waybound'', chapter 28</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Malice]]'s [[Path]] included the [[Crown Icon]], the [[Shadow Icon]], and the [[Strength Icon]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c29">''Waybound'', chapter 29</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Malice]] named her granddaughter [[Charity]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c29" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Malice]] named family members [[Justice]] and [[Pride]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c29" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Malice]] has a daughter whose armor grew to [[Dreadgod]] size.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c30">''Waybound'', chapter 30</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Yan Shoumei]] knows better than to be caught by [[Malice]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c3">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The [[Blood Sage]] was instructed to kill [[Malice]]’s children.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c14">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Malice]] asks if [[Eithan]] is single.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c14" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|“She will be fighting against the cults.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c11" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Malice had asked her: "What is your signature?"<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c26" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|“Return,” Malice commanded. The Way obeyed, twisting to return the fortress to the city from which it had come.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c23" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|“When I am finished with you, no one will remember you ever existed at all.”<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c26" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
